  • Deprecated Classes
    Class
    Description
    com.here.sdk.routing.BicycleOptions

    Will be removed in v4.28.0. Use RoutingOptions class instead.

    com.here.sdk.routing.BusOptions

    Will be removed in v4.28.0. Use RoutingOptions class instead.

    com.here.sdk.routing.CarOptions

    Will be removed in v4.28.0. Use RoutingOptions class instead.

    com.here.sdk.routing.EVCarOptions

    Will be removed in v4.28.0. Use RoutingOptions class instead.

    com.here.sdk.routing.EVTruckOptions

    Will be removed in v4.28.0. Use RoutingOptions class instead.

    com.here.sdk.routing.PedestrianOptions

    Will be removed in v4.28.0. Use RoutingOptions class instead.

    com.here.sdk.routing.PrivateBusOptions

    Will be removed in v4.28.0. Use RoutingOptions class instead.

    com.here.sdk.routing.RefreshRouteOptions

    Will be removed in v4.28.0. Use the RoutingOptions class instead.

    com.here.sdk.routing.ScooterOptions

    Will be removed in v4.28.0. Use RoutingOptions class instead.

    com.here.sdk.routing.TaxiOptions

    Will be removed in v4.28.0. Use RoutingOptions class instead.

    com.here.sdk.routing.TruckOptions

    Will be removed in v4.28.0. Use RoutingOptions class instead.

  • Deprecated Enum Classes
    Enum Class
    Description
    com.here.sdk.transport.TruckType

    Will be removed in v4.27.0. Use TruckCategory instead.

  • Deprecated Fields
    Field
    Description
    com.here.sdk.mapdata.PhysicalAttributes.isDividedRoad

    Will be removed in v4.26.0. Please use PhysicalAttributes.divider instead for getting RoadDivider and PhysicalAttributes.isMultiplyDigitized for getting multiply digitized attribute.

    com.here.sdk.mapdata.TollCost.vehicleProfiles

    Will be removed in v4.28.0. Use the TollCost.transport_specifications instead.

    com.here.sdk.navigation.BorderCrossingWarning.countryCode

    Will be removed in v4.26.0. Use the administrative_rules property to determine the country code.

    com.here.sdk.navigation.BorderCrossingWarning.speedLimits

    Will be removed in v4.26.0. Use the administrative_rules property to determine the speed limits.

    com.here.sdk.navigation.BorderCrossingWarning.stateCode

    Will be removed in v4.26.0. Use the administrative_rules property to determine the state code.

    com.here.sdk.navigation.ManeuverNotificationOptions.enableDestinationReachedNotification

    Will be removed in v4.27.0. Use the ManeuverNotificationOptions.arrivalNotificationOption instead

    com.here.sdk.navigation.RouteProgress.sectionIndex

    Will be removed in v4.27.0. Use RouteProgress.routeMatchedLocation instead.

    com.here.sdk.navigation.RouteProgress.spanIndex

    Will be removed in v4.27.0. Use RouteProgress.routeMatchedLocation instead.

    com.here.sdk.routing.IsolineOptions.carOptions

    Will be removed in v4.28.0. Use the routing_options instead.

    com.here.sdk.routing.IsolineOptions.evCarOptions

    Will be removed in v4.28.0. Use the routing_options instead.

    com.here.sdk.routing.IsolineOptions.evTruckOptions

    Will be removed in v4.28.0. Use the routing_options instead.

    com.here.sdk.routing.IsolineOptions.truckOptions

    Will be removed in v4.28.0. Use the routing_options instead.

    com.here.sdk.routing.ViolatedRestriction.Details.forbiddenTruckType

    Will be removed in v4.27.0. Use forbidden_truck_category instead.

    com.here.sdk.search.PlaceCategory.SIGHTS_LANDMARK_ATTACTION

    Will be removed in v4.26.0. Please use SIGHTS_LANDMARK_ATTRACTION instead.

    com.here.sdk.transport.VehicleSpecification.truckType

    Will be removed in v4.27.0. Use VehicleSpecification.truckCategory instead.

  • Deprecated Methods
    Method
    Description
    com.here.sdk.core.engine.LockingProcess.destroyLockingProcess(SDKOptions, long)

    Will be removed in v4.27.0, use LockingProcess.destroyLockingProcess(android.content.Context, SDKOptions, long) instead.

    com.here.sdk.core.engine.LockingProcess.getLockingProcessId(SDKOptions)

    Will be removed in v4.27.0, use LockingProcess.getLockingProcessId(android.content.Context, SDKOptions) instead.

    com.here.sdk.maploader.MapDownloader.onEnterForeground()

    Only part of Internal variant. Please use sdk.maploader.BackgroundMapOperationContext.onEnterForeground instead.

    com.here.sdk.mapview.LocationIndicator.setMarker3dModel(MapMarker3DModel, double, LocationIndicator.MarkerType)

    Will be removed in v4.27.0. Please use the overloaded method with RenderSize.Unit instead.

    com.here.sdk.mapview.MapCameraKeyframeTrack.lookAtDistance(List<ScalarKeyframe>, Easing, KeyframeInterpolationMode)

    Will be removed in v4.27.0. Use , Easing, KeyframeInterpolationMode) instead.

    com.here.sdk.mapview.MapContentSettings.configureVehicleRestrictionFilter(TransportMode, TruckSpecifications, List<HazardousMaterial>, TunnelCategory)

    Will be removed in v4.28.0, use MapContentSettings.configureVehicleRestrictionFilter(TransportSpecification) instead.

    com.here.sdk.mapview.MapSurface.setSurface(Context, Surface, int, int)

    Will be removed in v4.26.0. Please use attachSurface.

    com.here.sdk.mapview.MapSurface.setSurface(Context, Surface, int, int, MapSurface.RenderListener)

    Will be removed in v4.26.0. Please use attachSurface.

    com.here.sdk.navigation.FixedCameraBehavior.getCameraDistanceInMeters()

    Will be removed in v4.28.0. Use FixedCameraBehavior.getZoom() instead.

    com.here.sdk.navigation.FixedCameraBehavior.setCameraDistanceInMeters(double)

    Will be removed in v4.28.0. Use FixedCameraBehavior.getZoom() instead.

    com.here.sdk.prefetcher.RoutePrefetcher.prefetchAroundLocationWithRadius(GeoCoordinates, Double)

    Will be removed in v4.27.0. Please use PolygonPrefetcher.prefetch(com.here.sdk.core.GeoPolygon, com.here.sdk.prefetcher.PrefetchStatusListener) instead.

    com.here.sdk.routing.OfflineRoutingEngine.calculateRoute(List<Waypoint>, BicycleOptions, CalculateRouteCallback)

    Will be removed in v4.28.0. Use the calculate_route() methods with RoutingOptions parameter instead.

    com.here.sdk.routing.OfflineRoutingEngine.calculateRoute(List<Waypoint>, BusOptions, CalculateRouteCallback)

    Will be removed in v4.28.0. Use the calculate_route() methods with RoutingOptions parameter instead.

    Will be removed in v4.28.0. Use the calculate_route() methods with RoutingOptions parameter instead.

    Will be removed in v4.28.0. Use the calculate_route() methods with RoutingOptions parameter instead.

    Will be removed in v4.28.0. Use the calculate_route() methods with RoutingOptions parameter instead.

    Will be removed in v4.28.0. Use the calculate_route() methods with RoutingOptions parameter instead.

    Will be removed in v4.28.0. Use the calculate_route() methods with RoutingOptions parameter instead.

    Will be removed in v4.28.0. Use the calculate_route() methods with RoutingOptions parameter instead.

    com.here.sdk.routing.OfflineRoutingEngine.calculateRoute(List<Waypoint>, TaxiOptions, CalculateRouteCallback)

    Will be removed in v4.28.0. Use the calculate_route() methods with RoutingOptions parameter instead.

    com.here.sdk.routing.OfflineRoutingEngine.calculateRoute(List<Waypoint>, TruckOptions, CalculateRouteCallback)

    Will be removed in v4.28.0. Use the calculate_route() methods with RoutingOptions parameter instead.

    com.here.sdk.routing.OfflineRoutingEngine.importRoute(RouteHandle, RefreshRouteOptions, CalculateRouteCallback)

    Will be removed in v4.28.0. Use the import_route() method with RoutingOptions parameter instead.

    Will be removed in v4.28.0. Use the calculate_route() methods with RoutingOptions parameter instead.

    Will be removed in v4.28.0. Use the calculate_route() methods with RoutingOptions parameter instead.

    Will be removed in v4.28.0. Use the import_route() methods with RoutingOptions parameter instead.

    com.here.sdk.trafficawarenavigation.DynamicRoutingEngine.start(RouteHandle, List<Waypoint>, RefreshRouteOptions, DynamicRoutingListener)

    Will be removed in v4.28.0. Use the start() method with RoutingOptions parameter instead.

  • Deprecated Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    com.here.sdk.navigation.ManeuverNotificationOptions(LanguageCode, UnitSystem)

    Will be removed in v4.23.0. Use the default constructor instead.

    com.here.sdk.navigation.ManeuverNotificationOptions(LanguageCode, UnitSystem, List<ManeuverNotificationType>, boolean, boolean, boolean, boolean, boolean)

    Will be removed in v4.23.0. Use the default constructor instead.

    com.here.sdk.navigation.ManeuverNotificationOptions(LanguageCode, UnitSystem, List<ManeuverNotificationType>, boolean, boolean, boolean, boolean, NotificationFormatOption, boolean)

    Will be removed in v4.23.0. Use the default constructor instead.

    com.here.sdk.navigation.ManeuverNotificationOptions(LanguageCode, UnitSystem, List<ManeuverNotificationType>, boolean, boolean, boolean, boolean, TextUsageOptions, boolean)

    Will be removed in v4.23.0. Use the default constructor instead.

    com.here.sdk.routing.IsolineOptions(IsolineOptions.Calculation, CarOptions)

    Will be removed in v4.28.0. Use the constructor with RoutingOptions parameter instead.

    com.here.sdk.routing.IsolineOptions(IsolineOptions.Calculation, EVCarOptions)

    Will be removed in v4.28.0. Use the constructor with RoutingOptions parameter instead.

    com.here.sdk.routing.IsolineOptions(IsolineOptions.Calculation, EVTruckOptions)

    Will be removed in v4.28.0. Use the constructor with RoutingOptions parameter instead.

    com.here.sdk.routing.IsolineOptions(IsolineOptions.Calculation, TruckOptions)

    Will be removed in v4.28.0. Use the constructor with RoutingOptions parameter instead.

  • Deprecated Enum Constants
    Enum Constant
    Description
    com.here.sdk.routing.ChargingConnectorType.TESLA

    Will be removed in v4.28.0, use ChargingConnectorType.SAE_J3400 instead.

    com.here.sdk.venue.routing.VenueTransportMode.AUTO

    Will be removed in v4.26.0. Use transport code CAR instead.

    com.here.sdk.venue.routing.VenueTransportMode.EMERGENCY_VEHICLE

    Will be removed in v4.26.0. Use transport code CAR instead.

    com.here.sdk.venue.routing.VenueTransportMode.MOTORCYCLE

    Will be removed in v4.26.0. Use transport code SCOOTER instead.
